_meta.description: Wave 3 normalization decisions for process-object extraction, duplicate suppression, and alias retention.

commercial_customer.customer-purchase-or.purpose: Protect customer commercial commitment, customer-order acknowledgment, and quote/SO linkage as an auditable object instead of leaving demand truth embedded in Sales Order text fields.

procurement_supplier_quality.purchase-re.reason: Purchase requisition is already a governed lifecycle owner in runtime and must not be recreated.

procurement_supplier_quality.supplier-as.reason: Supplier ASN already owns inbound shipment notice and discrepancy lifecycle.

procurement_supplier_quality.purchase-re.reason: Purchase receipt is already the governed receiving and IQC handoff object.

planning_production.ipqc-inspections.reason: IPQC already exists as a first-class in-process inspection owner.

quality_improvement.fqc-inspections.decision: Retain as alias only. Do not create a duplicate FQC object until a distinct finished-goods release gate exists before outbound OQC/shipping.
split_criteria: A dedicated finished-goods release gate exists before outbound inspection or dispatch.
FQC owns a distinct sampling plan or defect taxonomy from OQC.
FQC is owned by a separate KPI or approval authority from OQC.

quality_management.oqc_inspections.reason: Canonical successor for FQC alias until a distinct gate is proven.
